title: Create a Payment Portfolio
content:
Use this endpoint to create a Payment Portfolio. ## Request **Endpoint** https://business-api.tiktok.com/open_api/v1.3/payment_portfolio/create/ **Method** POST **Header** ```xtable |Field{30%}|Data Type{15%}|Description{55%}| |---|---|---| |Access-Token {Required}|string|Authorized access token. For details, see [Authentication](https://business-api.tiktok.com/portal/docs?id=1738373164380162).| |Content-Type {Required}|string|Request message type.
Allowed format: `application/json`. | ``` **Parameters** ``` xtable |Field{30%}|Data Type{15%}|Description{55%}| |--- |--- |--- | |payment_portfolio_name{Required}|string|The name of the Payment Portfolio.| |advertiser_ids{Required}|string[]|The list of ad accounts that you want to link to the Payment Portfolio.
You can only link ad accounts that belong to the same client as the Payment Portfolio.

Max size: 20.

  • If the ad account belongs to a Business Center, you need to have Finance Manager or Admin access to the Business Center. To confirm your access to a Business Center, use [/bc/get/](https://business-api.tiktok.com/portal/docs?id=1737115687501826) and check the returned `user_role` and `finance_role`.
  • If the ad account does not belong to a Business Center, you need to have Admin or Operator access to the ad account.

Note: If `advertiser_ids` contains any invalid IDs, the whole call will fail.| |payment_portfolio_type|string|The type of the Payment Portfolio.

Enum values:

  • `SHARED`: Advanced Payment Portfolio. For Advanced Payment Portfolios, funds are centrally managed and jointly used by all linked ad accounts.

Default value: `SHARED`.| ``` ### Example ```xcodeblock (code curl http) curl --location --request POST 'https://business-api.tiktok.com/open_api/v1.3/payment_portfolio/create/' \ --header 'Access-Token: {{Access-Token}}' \ --header 'Content-Type: application/json' \ --data '{ "payment_portfolio_name": "{{payment_portfolio_name}}", "advertiser_ids": ["{{advertiser_id}}", "{{advertiser_id}}", "{{advertiser_id}}"] }' (/code) ``` ## Response ``` xtable |Field{30%}|Type{15%}|Description{55%}| |---|---|---| |code |number|Response code. For the complete list of response codes and descriptions, see [Appendix-Return Code](https://business-api.tiktok.com/portal/docs?id=1737172488964097). | |message|string|Response message. For details, see [Appendix - Return Codes](https://business-api.tiktok.com/portal/docs?id=1737172488964097).| |request_id |string|The log ID of a request, which uniquely identifies the request. | |data |object|Returned data.| #|payment_portfolio_id|string|The ID of the Payment Portfolio.| #|payment_portfolio_name|string|The name of the Payment Portfolio.| #|payment_portfolio_type|string|The type of the Payment Portfolio.

Enum values:
  • `SHARED`: Advanced Payment Portfolio. For Advanced Payment Portfolios, funds are centrally managed and jointly used by all linked ad accounts.
| ``` ### Example ```xcodeblock (code Success-Response http) HTTPS/1.1 200 OK { "code": 0, "message": "OK", "request_id": "{{request_id}}", "data": { "payment_portfolio_id": "{{payment_portfolio_id}}", "payment_portfolio_name": "{{payment_portfolio_name}}", "payment_portfolio_type": "SHARED" } } (/code) ```
